def positive_python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_lazy_init_on_first_user_request():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_lazy_init_on_first_user_request"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag lazy initialization that shifts a large one-time cost onto the first user request without warmup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
